subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-25 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Speak at the gatherings!  Be as a flame of fire and a brilliant star; thereby you shall illumine this city
subcodes.first_line_orig: در مجامع صحبت کنید مانند شعلهٴ نار شوید مثل ستارهٴ درخشنده گردید تا این شهر را روشن نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
